title: TGPSC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Assistant Scientist Posts
description: The Telangana Public Service Commission (TSPSC) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 20 Assistant Scientist Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree can use this chance and apply for the TGPSC Notification 2026 . Here, we provide more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, educational details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online on or before the last date of ...
